note: Root-caused by simulating _pickOpForModel against the real commandRegistry during the MPI-242 user-ux pass. Pre-existing; affects every image model.
Scope split: Gallery revert PROVEN; History-workspace revert NOT investigated (own gating). May need its own card.

todo->doing. Fixed symptom (a): setModelList no longer re-derives the op when the model is unchanged (a refresh is not a model switch), so _pickOpForModel can no longer revert the user's deliberate op via supportedOps declaration order on Gallery<->History nav. Investigating symptom (b) History-workspace upscale revert next.
doing->done, accepted. Symptom (a) shipped in MpiPromptBox.setModelList. Symptom (b) split to MPI-250 (distinct mechanism, needs repro).

done->doing (REOPENED). setModelList-only fix was insufficient; user verified revert persists. True root cause = op never persisted across block remount + PromptBox re-picks. Full fix: per-model session op memory (s_selectedOpByModel) + programmatic-flag on setOperation + seed-at-mount in both blocks + reuse re-asserts op last. Covers all 4 symptoms.
